# Help Chatbot вҖ” Implementation Plan

## Problem Statement

Build a web-based LLM-driven chatbot using Blazor that answers customer questions from internal product PDF documentation. Uses Postgres (with pgvector) for data/vector storage and a local file folder (`Docs/`) for source PDFs.

## Technology Selection (per decision tree)

This is a **RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)** scenario:
- **Microsoft.Extensions.AI** вҖ” abstraction layer (`IChatClient`, `IEmbeddingGenerator`)
- **Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions** вҖ” vector store abstraction for pgvector
- **Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DataIngestion** (preview) вҖ” document chunking/ingestion pipeline  
- **OpenAI** вҖ” LLM provider (chat completions + embeddings)
- **UglyToad.PdfPig** вҖ” PDF text extraction
- **Npgsql + pgvector** вҖ” Postgres with vector similarity search
- **Blazor Server (Interactive)** вҖ” real-time chat UI with streaming responses

**Not using Agent Framework** вҖ” this is a single prompt вҶ’ response with context retrieval, not an agentic loop.

## Architecture Overview

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ       в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Blazor Chat UI   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ  ChatService     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (streaming SSE)   в”Ӯв—Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ӯ  (RAG pipeline)  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ       в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                      в”Ӯ
                         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                         в–ј            в–ј            в–ј
                  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                  в”Ӯ pgvector  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ IChatCli в”Ӯ в”ӮIEmbeddingв”Ӯ
                  в”Ӯ (vectors) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (OpenAI) в”Ӯ в”ӮGenerator в”Ӯ
                  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Ingestion flow:** PDF вҶ’ extract text вҶ’ chunk вҶ’ embed вҶ’ store in pgvector  
**Query flow:** User question вҶ’ embed вҶ’ vector search вҶ’ inject top-K chunks вҶ’ LLM generates answer with sources

1. **Configure project & packages** вҖ” Add all required NuGet packages to `HelpChatbot.csproj`

8. **Wire up DI & middleware** вҖ” `Program.cs` with all service registrations, health checks

- **Secret management:** API keys via user-secrets/environment variables, never in committed config

в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Layout/

в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ _Imports.razor
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Data/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ChatDbContext.cs
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ DocumentChunk.cs
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Models/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ChatMessage.cs
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ AiOptions.cs
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Services/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ChatService.cs
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ DocumentIngestionService.cs
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ PdfTextExtractor.cs
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Docs/
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ product-guide.pdf
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Program.cs
в”ңв”Җв”Җ appsettings.json
в””в”Җв”Җ HelpChatbot.csproj

## Notes

- Postgres must have the `pgvector` extension enabled (`CREATE EXTENSION vector;`)

# Help Chatbot вҖ” Implementation Plan

## Problem Statement

Build a web-based LLM-driven chatbot using Blazor that answers customer questions from internal product PDF documentation. Uses Postgres (with pgvector) for data/vector storage and a local file folder (`Docs/`) for source PDFs.

## Technology Selection (per decision tree)

This is a **RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)** scenario:
- **Microsoft.Extensions.AI** вҖ” abstraction layer (`IChatClient`, `IEmbeddingGenerator`)
- **Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions** вҖ” vector store abstraction for pgvector
- **OpenAI** вҖ” LLM provider (chat completions + embeddings)
- **UglyToad.PdfPig** вҖ” PDF text extraction
- **Npgsql + pgvector** вҖ” Postgres with vector similarity search
- **Blazor Server (Interactive)** вҖ” real-time chat UI with streaming responses

**Not using Agent Framework** вҖ” this is a single prompt вҶ’ response with context retrieval, not an agentic loop.

## Architecture Overview

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ       в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Blazor Chat UI   в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ  ChatService     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (streaming SSE)   в”Ӯв—Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ӯ  (RAG pipeline)  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ       в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                      в”Ӯ
                         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                         в–ј            в–ј            в–ј
                  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                  в”Ӯ pgvector  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ IChatCli в”Ӯ в”ӮIEmbeddingв”Ӯ
                  в”Ӯ (vectors) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (OpenAI) в”Ӯ в”ӮGenerator в”Ӯ
                  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Ingestion flow:** PDF вҶ’ extract text вҶ’ chunk вҶ’ embed вҶ’ store in pgvector  
**Query flow:** User question вҶ’ embed вҶ’ vector search вҶ’ inject top-K chunks вҶ’ LLM generates answer with sources

## Todos

1. **Configure project & packages** вҖ” Add all required NuGet packages to `HelpChatbot.csproj`
2. **Set up configuration** вҖ” `appsettings.json` with Postgres connection string, AI options (model, temperature), docs folder path
3. **Create data models** вҖ” `DocumentChunk` entity for EF Core + vector column; chat message model
4. **Set up EF Core + pgvector** вҖ” DbContext, migrations, pgvector extension
5. **Build PDF ingestion service** вҖ” `DocumentIngestionService` that reads PDFs from `Docs/`, extracts text, chunks semantically, embeds, and upserts into Postgres
6. **Build RAG chat service** вҖ” `ChatService` that embeds user query, retrieves relevant chunks, constructs prompt with context, streams LLM response
7. **Build Blazor chat UI** вҖ” Interactive chat component with message history, streaming display, source attribution
8. **Wire up DI & middleware** вҖ” `Program.cs` with all service registrations, health checks
9. **Add ingestion endpoint/startup** вҖ” Background service or admin endpoint to trigger PDF ingestion
10. **Test & validate** вҖ” Build succeeds, verify structure is correct

## Key Design Decisions

- **Chunking:** Split on paragraph boundaries (~500 tokens per chunk) with overlap for context continuity
- **Embedding model:** `text-embedding-3-small` (cost-effective, good quality)
- **Chat model:** `gpt-4o-mini-2024-07-18` (pinned version, good balance of cost/quality)
- **Vector search:** Top 5 chunks, minimum similarity score 0.75
- **Streaming:** Use `IAsyncEnumerable` for real-time token delivery to UI
- **Source attribution:** Each response includes which document chunks were used
- **Secret management:** API keys via user-secrets/environment variables, never in committed config

## Project Structure

```
HelpChatbot/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Components/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ App.razor
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Pages/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Chat.razor
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Layout/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ MainLayout.razor
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ MainLayout.razor.css
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ _Imports.razor
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Data/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ChatDbContext.cs
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ DocumentChunk.cs
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Models/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ChatMessage.cs
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ AiOptions.cs
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Services/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ChatService.cs
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ DocumentIngestionService.cs
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ PdfTextExtractor.cs
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Docs/
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ product-guide.pdf
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Program.cs
в”ңв”Җв”Җ appsettings.json
в””в”Җв”Җ HelpChatbot.csproj
```

## Notes

- Postgres must have the `pgvector` extension enabled (`CREATE EXTENSION vector;`)
- Run `dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate` after setting up DbContext
- The ingestion service can be triggered manually or run as a hosted service on startup
- Consider adding a "last ingested" timestamp to avoid re-processing unchanged files

# Help Chatbot вҖ” Implementation Plan

## Problem Statement

Build a web-based LLM-driven chatbot using Blazor that answers customer questions from internal product PDF documentation. Uses Postgres (with pgvector) for data/vector storage and a local file folder (`Docs/`) for source PDFs.

## Technology Selection (per decision tree)

This is a **RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)** scenario:
- **Microsoft.Extensions.AI** вҖ” abstraction layer (`IChatClient`, `IEmbeddingGenerator`)
- **Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions** вҖ” vector store abstraction for pgvector
- **OpenAI** вҖ” LLM provider (chat completions + embeddings)
- **UglyToad.PdfPig** вҖ” PDF text extraction
- **Npgsql + pgvector** вҖ” Postgres with vector similarity search
- **Blazor Server (Interactive)** вҖ” real-time chat UI with streaming responses

+5. **Build PDF ingestion service** вҖ” `DocumentIngestionService` that reads PDFs from `Docs/`, extracts text, chunks semantically, embeds, and upserts into Postgres
+6. **Build RAG chat service** вҖ” `ChatService` that embeds user query, retrieves relevant chunks, constructs prompt with context, streams LLM response
+7. **Build Blazor chat UI** вҖ” Interactive chat component with message history, streaming display, source attribution
+8. **Wire up DI & middleware** вҖ” `Program.cs` with all service registrations, health checks
+9. **Add ingestion endpoint/startup** вҖ” Background service or admin endpoint to trigger PDF ingestion
+10. **Test & validate** вҖ” Build succeeds, verify structure is correct
+
+## Key Design Decisions
+
+- **Chunking:** Split on paragraph boundaries (~500 tokens per chunk) with overlap for context continuity
+- **Embedding model:** `text-embedding-3-small` (cost-effective, good quality)
+- **Chat model:** `gpt-4o-mini-2024-07-18` (pinned version, good balance of cost/quality)
+- **Vector search:** Top 5 chunks, minimum similarity score 0.75
+- **Streaming:** Use `IAsyncEnumerable` for real-time token delivery to UI
+- **Source attribution:** Each response includes which document chunks were used
+- **Secret management:** API keys via user-secrets/environment variables, never in committed config
+
+## Project Structure
+
+```
+HelpChatbot/

+в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ App.razor
+в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Pages/
+в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Chat.razor
+в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Layout/
+в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ MainLayout.razor
+в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ MainLayout.razor.css
+в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ _Imports.razor
+в”ңв”Җв”Җ Data/
+в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ChatDbContext.cs
+в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ DocumentChunk.cs
+в”ңв”Җв”Җ Models/

+в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ AiOptions.cs

+в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ DocumentIngestionService.cs

+в”ңв”Җв”Җ Docs/

+```
+
+## Notes
+
+- Postgres must have the `pgvector` extension enabled (`CREATE EXTENSION vector;`)
+- Run `dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate` after setting up DbContext
+- The ingestion service can be triggered manually or run as a hosted service on startup
+- Consider adding a "last ingested" timestamp to avoid re-processing unchanged files
